nodes.name: Bamboo antshrike

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The bamboo antshrike (Cymbilaimus sanctaemariae) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The bamboo antshrike is found in the western Amazon Basin of southeastern Peru, western Brazil, and northwestern Bolivia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Peru it occurs in the departments of Ucayali, Cuzco, Madre de Dios, and Puno

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Brazil it occurs in Acre and Rondônia states, and in Bolivia the departments of Pando, La Paz, and Beni. The bamboo antshrike almost exclusively inhabits stands of bamboo, typically of genus Guadua, in humid lowland and foothill forest
